mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_like (article_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT article_id FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
